# numbersAsStrings

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value indicating whether the numbers in fields are represented as strings.

## Declaration

```swift
readonly attribute Boolean numbersAsStrings;
```

## Discussion

Set the `numbersAsStrings` key in the `options` parameter when requesting records using the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Database/fetchRecords] and similar methods.

## Getting Records

- **records**: The records for the successful operations.
